entities.description: m31 resetn pu 1v8 is a reset signal used as a baseboard peripheral reset signal  which needs to be isolated to prevent power down sleep from affecting its input level
m31 resetn pu 3v3 is a reset input signal that requires buffering to isolate it from the effects of the m31 resetn pu 1v8 reset signal

relations.description: the m31 resetn pu 1v8 reset signal needs to be isolated from the m31 resetn pu 3v3 reset input signal to prevent power down sleep from affecting the input level
